templates: The Provider shall indemnify and hold harmless the Client against any claims.
Provider agrees to indemnify Client from any liability arising out of services.
One party shall compensate the other for any harm or loss.
The total liability of either party shall not exceed the fees paid.
Liability is limited to the amount paid in the preceding 12 months.
In no event shall liability exceed $10,000.
Either party may terminate this agreement with 30 days written notice.
This agreement may be terminated for cause immediately.
Termination for convenience is permitted upon notice.
Receiving party shall keep all information confidential.
Confidential information shall not be disclosed to third parties.
This agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of New York.
The laws of California shall apply.
Jurisdiction is exclusive to the courts of London.
